TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Tjusepayuan, title = Tjusepayuan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tjusepayuan} }

S.FORM: Tjusepayuan Itiniay i Sandimen Cen no Pingtung ko Tjusepayuan a niyaro', 148 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 504 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 99% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 498 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 1% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 6 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Paiwan83%, Rukai10%, Bunun1%, roma5%.
S.PHON: tjo~u~us…ôpajo~u~uan itiniaj i san…¨~…ģim…ôn ¶…ôn no~u piŇčto~u~uŇč ko~u tjo~u~us…ôpajo~u~uan a nijaro~u °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, * ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u paiwan**%, ro~u~ukai**%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un*%, ro~uma*%.
S.FORM: Tjusepayuan Itiniay i Sandimen Cen no Pingtung ko Tjusepayuan a niyaro', 148 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 504 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 99% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 498 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 1% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 6 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Paiwan83%, Rukai10%, Bunun1%, roma5%.
S.PHON: tjo~u~us…ôpajo~u~uan itiniaj i san…¨~…ģim…ôn ¶…ôn no~u piŇčto~u~uŇč ko~u tjo~u~us…ôpajo~u~uan a nijaro~u °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, * ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u paiwan**%, ro~u~ukai**%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un*%, ro~uma*%.
